# jasnauskaite.lt — Inidė Jasnauskaitė-Jonaitė

## About
Content creator based in Vilnius, Lithuania. 359K Instagram followers, 125K TikTok.
785+ branded posts across 69 brands. 590M+ total views. 8+ years of experience.
Working with the biggest Lithuanian and international brands.

## What I Do
Fashion, beauty, lifestyle & travel content creation for brands.
Services: Instagram Reels, Stories, Posts, TikTok content.
Full production: concept, filming, editing, color grading, post-production.

## Key Results
- 85 viral posts (1M+ views each, avg 4.5M)
- 69+ brand partners including Mionetto, Akropolis, Nissan, Hellmann's, Lancôme, McDonald's, Maxima, Barbora, Tele2, Milka
- 5.0% engagement rate (rolling 12 months)
- Branded content avg 493K views per post
- Top case: Hellmann's — 15M views across 5 posts, single reel 14M views

## Pages
- / — Portfolio, about, services, FAQ, contact
- /insights/ — Articles about creator partnerships, influencer marketing ROI, and brand collaboration best practices
- /links/ — Social media links (Instagram, TikTok, Rent Boutique)
